title: RFTools (Legacy)
description: Blocks and items to help with Redflux (dimension builder, crafter, monitor, scanner, etc.)
body:
# RFTools (Legacy) RFTools is a mod containing various tools that are related to RF (Redflux) or technology in general. The blocks and items that are in the current version are usable and feature complete. This mod is for 1.7.10, 1.8.9, 1.9 and 1.10.2. The major feature in this mod (since 2.00) is the Dimension Builder. With this device you can make your own dimensions for exploration, mining, building and so on. ## 1.14+ **RFTools has been split into multiple projects for Minecraft versions 1.14 and higher:** - [RFTools Base](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-base) - [RFTools Utility](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-utility) - [RFTools Builder](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-builder) - [RFTools Control](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-control) - [RFTools Storage](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-storage) - [RFTools Power](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-poer) - [RFTools Dimensions](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-dimensions) ## About **Note!** RFTools requires [McJtyLib](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/mcjtylib)! **Note!** If you want to use dimensions then you have to get the [RFTools Dimensions](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-dimensions) mod as the dimension builder has been moved there. Also check out [RFTools Control](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rftools-dimensions) which is another companion mod for RFTools, adding powerful automation capabilities. ## Modpacks You can use RFTools in your modpacks without restrictions.

## Support You can support me by [pledging on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/McJty). ## RFTools spotlight from Direwolf20 (part one out of five)
